description_long: This jet ski features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly dark metallic body accented by intricate panel lines and colored striping. The hull is wide and flared, with pronounced side fins that curve downward, giving it a stable and aggressive stance. The central section is raised and streamlined, likely housing the engine and seating area, with a black, glossy top surface. At the rear, two cylindrical exhausts or propulsion units are visible, flanked by additional mechanical detailing. The front is equipped with a translucent, light blue element that may serve as a headlight or sensor. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, possibly sci-fi inspired watercraft suitable for urban waterways or futuristic environments.
description: A sleek, dark metallic jet ski with wide flared fins, colored striping, and a streamlined central body featuring a glossy black top and rear propulsion units.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared fins, central glossy black section, and a translucent blue front element.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular side fins, colored striping, and the raised central body with visible mechanical details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the dual cylindrical propulsion units and the symmetrical, mechanical structure of the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular fins, colored accents, and the streamlined body profile.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is integrated into the front section, appearing as a horizontal bar with possible grips at each end, colored in dark tones and possibly featuring embedded controls.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat appears to be a single, elongated section in the center of the jet ski, contoured for one rider, with a smooth, black surface and no visible seams or additional seating positions.
